# mtncloud_security_group (Resource)

Manages an MTN Cloud security group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_security_group" "web" {
  name        = "web-servers"
  description = "Allow SSH and HTTPS"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the security group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the security group.

### Read-Only

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the security group is active.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the security group is enabled.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the security group.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import mtncloud_security_group.web 42
```
